body: What's your unpopular music opinion? Mine is that Abbey Road is overrated compared to Revolver.
Hot take! Mine is that Nirvana's In Utero is way better than Nevermind. Rawer and more honest.
I think film scores deserve more respect as an art form. Hans Zimmer's Interstellar soundtrack is peak music.
Agreed on film scores! Jonny Greenwood's work on There Will Be Blood is haunting. Radiohead's loss is cinema's gain.
These are all great takes. My unpopular opinion: auto-tune when used artistically (like T-Pain or Bon Iver) is genuinely creative.
